spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (commit, deferred, handlers, navigation) and 14 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 7 form controls wired to ~7012 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 8 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5134734612496384 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on-system, but: button rule overrides background without re-asserting color.

openQuestions.title: Fix design-system regressions
openQuestions.detail: Issues found: button rule overrides background without re-asserting color. Convert raw hex to the existing CSS variables (--bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted, --border-black, --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose) and make sure any button background override also restates color.

summary: Solid concept page: 5 of 6 rubric criteria pass, no fails. Minor follow-ups left as open questions.
